nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Oh? When friends come from afar, is it not delightful? This poor Taoist is He Zudao, Master of the Kunlun Sect, known as the 'Three Saints of Qin, Go, and Sword.'

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: This poor Taoist has devoted his life to the three Ways of Qin, Go, and Sword, especially Go, reaching a transcendent state. Seeing your extraordinary bearing, you must also be a person of the Go Way?

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: This poor Taoist has a technique called 'Three Saints Unity' that fuses the essence of Qin, Go, and Sword into one, with infinite power when applied to Go.

options.text: I want to learn 'Three Saints Unity'
Senior, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: This poor Taoist has cultivated Qin, Go, and Sword for decades and finally comprehended their interconnected principle. The rhythm of Qin, the variations of Go, the sharpness of Sword - they are one.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: 'Three Saints Unity' allows you to simultaneously deploy three variations during a game, like the interweaving of Qin music, Go patterns, and sword energy, leaving opponents unable to resist.

options.text: Profoundly mysterious! Please teach me, Senior

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Good! However, the essence of this technique cannot be grasped without extremely high understanding. If you want to learn, you must play a game with this poor Taoist first.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Years ago, this poor Taoist traveled the world and exchanged moves with masters from all paths - few were worthy opponents. If you can beat this poor Taoist, it proves you have the understanding.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Please! Let you witness this poor Taoist's 'Three Saints' technique!

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Marvelous! Marvelous! Benefactor, your game flows like clouds and water, already possessing the bearing of 'Three Saints.' This poor Taoist will teach you this technique.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: at crucial moments, fuse the essence of Qin, Go, and Sword, producing triple variations. Limited to once per game with a 45-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Remember, 'Qin has its rhythm, Go has its principles, Sword has its intent.' Only when the three unite can you unleash maximum power.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Now that benefactor has learned this technique, you'll surely achieve great things in the future. But remember, no matter how high your martial arts, maintain a benevolent heart.

options.text: Thank you for your teaching, Senior!
I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged, benefactor. When this poor Taoist was cultivating, I also endured many hardships. Take your time, no need to rush.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: This poor Taoist has cultivated the three Ways of Qin, Go, and Sword all his life, deeply understanding the principle that all things in heaven and earth are interconnected. Go is the same.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Between black and white lies the principle of Yin and Yang; the crisscrossing secretly matches the power of heaven and earth. If you can penetrate these mysteries, you can attain the Way.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Excellent, excellent, the time is not yet right. When benefactor is ready, you can come to Kunlun to find this poor Taoist anytime.

nodes.speaker: He Zudao
nodes.text: Until we meet again, benefactor! May you go far on the path of Go!
